questions.q: How much time do you spend watching IPL every day?
questions.explanation: If you watch daily, a lot of time gets consumed.

questions.q: After the match ends… what do you actually get?
questions.explanation: For most people, it's just timepass.

questions.q: How many days does IPL run in total?
If you watch daily for 2 months… how much total time is spent?
What can you do in those 100 hours?
questions.explanation: That time can change your life.
Players and brands both earn money.

questions.q: What are YOU earning from it?
questions.explanation: For many, it becomes a waste of time.
Many people don’t even realize it.

questions.q: What is more important in your life?
Do you postpone work to watch matches?
What does watching IPL mostly give you?
In the end… what should you protect?
Is IPL just a sport… or also a business?
questions.explanation: IPL is both a sport and a big business.

questions.q: Who benefits the most from IPL?
questions.explanation: Companies earn more through ads and sponsorships.

questions.q: While watching a match… what do you become?
Who pays for your attention in IPL?
questions.explanation: Companies buy your attention through ads.

questions.q: What do you see the most during a match?
Match results change every day…, But your life changes only when YOU do.
